svg.title: Wavefinder system diagram
svg.desc: Data flow from user input through retrieval, generation, and human evaluation in the Wavefinder RAG music recommender.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user query reach the RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does the auto-router decide which retrieval mode to use?')
sendPrompt('How does semantic search work in Wavefinder?')
sendPrompt('How does TF-IDF + popularity ranking work?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the rankings pickle?')
sendPrompt('How is the numbered catalog built for Gemini?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini use the catalog to generate recommendations?')
sendPrompt('How does the citation verifier work?')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI server serve responses to the frontend?')
sendPrompt('How does the batch mode test the retrieval pipeline?')
